'''vazhaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ugrug|ugrug]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-zh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ugrug|ugrug]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vazhaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væzhæbæth|væzhæbæth]] || [[word:væzhæbæj|væzhæbæj]] || [[word:væzhæbæsh|væzhæbæsh]] || [[word:væzhæbæ|væzhæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vazhazhabath|vazhazhabath]] || [[word:vazhazhabaj|vazhazhabaj]] || [[word:vazhazhabash|vazhazhabash]] || [[word:vazhazhaba|vazhazhaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vazhabath|vazhabath]] || [[word:vazhabaj|vazhabaj]] || [[word:vazhabash|vazhabash]] || [[word:vazhaba|vazhaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vazhafbath|vazhafbath]] || [[word:vazhafbaj|vazhafbaj]] || [[word:vazhafbash|vazhafbash]] || [[word:vazhafbaf|vazhafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vazhabatha|vazhabatha]] || [[word:vazhabaja|vazhabaja]] || [[word:vazhabasha|vazhabasha]] || [[word:vazhabaka|vazhabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vazhabath|vazhabath]] || [[word:vazhabaj|vazhabaj]] || [[word:vazhabash|vazhabash]] || [[word:vazhaba|vazhaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vazhabathal|vazhabathal]] || [[word:vazhabajal|vazhabajal]] || [[word:vazhabashal|vazhabashal]] || [[word:vazhabakal|vazhabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vazhabathatha|vazhabathatha]] || [[word:vazhabajaja|vazhabajaja]] || [[word:vazhabashasha|vazhabashasha]] || [[word:vazhabaka|vazhabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vazhabathan|vazhabathan]] || [[word:vazhabajan|vazhabajan]] || [[word:vazhabashan|vazhabashan]] || [[word:vazhabakan|vazhabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vazhabathaoro|vazhabathaoro]] || [[word:vazhabajaoro|vazhabajaoro]] || [[word:vazhabashaoro|vazhabashaoro]] || [[word:vazhabakaoro|vazhabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
